message:
Add concurrent multi-session robot send+ack stress test (bd-1680n)

Adds TestConcurrentMultiSessionRobotSendAckStress, a focused E2E stress
test that exercises the --robot-send --track path across multiple tmux
sessions simultaneously to catch cross-session leakage or ack-handling
flakes.

Test design:
- Spawns 4 isolated sessions with independent project directories and
  a dedicated state DB to avoid contaminating real state
- Runs 3 iterations of concurrent tracked sends (one goroutine per
  session per iteration), each with unique marker strings
- Validates JSON send+ack response structure: success flags, session
  identity match (send.session == ack.session == expected), and at
  least one ack confirmation per send
- After all iterations, captures pane output from each session and
  verifies: (a) each session contains its own markers, and (b) no
  session contains markers from any other session (cross-session
  leakage detection)
- Uses testutil throttling (RequireTmuxThrottled) to avoid overwhelming
  the tmux server under CI load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
